summary: First-time MVP test of RefBoard app. All 9 backend API tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with dark theme, all 6 seeded categories visible, AI autofill works (OG fetch + title/description), all screens accessible, Palak team member shown. One potential AI category suggestion issue noted.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - whitespace/period text node outside <Text> component

integration_issues.issue: After entering figma.com URL, title/description/thumbnail fetched correctly but category selector still showed 'Select category...' even after 5s wait. AI may not be suggesting a category or the cat_id returned doesn't match Supabase IDs. Needs further investigation with longer wait time.

issues: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warning - should use 'boxShadow' instead (React Native Web compatibility issue)

react_native_issues.issue: Unexpected text node (likely a whitespace or period) as direct child of View - must be wrapped in <Text>

action_items: Fix 'Unexpected text node' warning - find and wrap bare text/whitespace in <Text> component in View children
Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' for React Native Web compatibility
Verify AI category suggestion: check if cat_id from Gemini response correctly matches Supabase category IDs after OG fetch (may need longer wait or better debugging in add.tsx)
Consider adding @react-native-async-storage/async-storage version 2.2.0 and expo-clipboard ~8.0.8 to match expected Expo compatibility versions
critical_code_review_comments: api.ts: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL fallback to '' means silent API failures if env var missing - should throw error
add.tsx: AI categorization errors are silently caught (empty catch block at line 102) - hard to debug when AI fails
No Supabase Realtime subscription implemented in AppContext (listed as feature) - needs verification

success_rate.frontend: 90% - all screens load, navigation works, AI title/description autofill works, categories visible, Palak shown; AI category suggestion unconfirmed

seed_data_creation: No test data created. 1 existing reference 'Example' in Products category already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP is functional. Key flows working: home feed with categories, Quick Save with AI autofill (OG fetch confirmed), category picker modal, categories CRUD screens, team/settings screen with Palak. Main items to verify: 1) Supabase Realtime subscription actually subscribed in AppContext 2) AI category suggestion cat_id correctly matching Supabase IDs 3) Fix text node warning
